{{Infobox location
| name = Sarcoline City
| introduced = Threshold: Stories from Cradle
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Sarcoline City is a walled urban center located within the monster-filled wilderness of [[Harness]]. While its exterior walls appear monotonous, the interior is a vibrant environment populated by diverse groups of people and creatures of various sizes. The city serves as a hub where travelers move through its gates alongside many different types of monsters. It is known to house ancient monsters and functions as a central point from which legends spread to other walled cities in the region. Within its boundaries, the headquarters known as [[Eternity]] operates as a busy, self-contained area characterized by manicured greenery and a prominent central spire.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Located within [[Harness]], Sarcoline City is a colorful urban center characterized by its smooth, pale peach-colored stone walls and gates. The city serves as a bustling hub where people travel alongside monsters of many different sizes. During his travels, [[Ziel]] passed through the settlement and discovered that its fortifications were too durable for his normal [[madra]] to penetrate.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The walls of [[Sarcoline City]] are made of pale peach-colored blocks of smooth stone.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Sarcoline City]] is a colorful city with people traveling with monsters of various sizes.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Sarcoline City]] is a location [[Ziel]] has traveled through.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Sarcoline City]] is a location with walls and gates.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Sarcoline City]]'s walls are too strong for [[Ziel]]'s normal [[madra]] to bite through.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Sarcoline City]] is a walled city in [[Harness]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Settlements]]
